root_cause: No favicon declared in arie-backoffice.html and no /favicon.ico route; browser auto-requests /favicon.ico -> 404. Confirmed by code inspection (deterministic). No other asset in the page can 404.
fix: Added one inline <link rel=icon> (1x1 transparent PNG data URI) to <head>. No backend/routing/auth/behaviour change; covers /backoffice and all sub-routes.

tests_run.static_html_check: pass (link well-formed, valid data URI, no structural change)
tests_run.live_browser_smoke: pending_operator_codex (no staging/browser access in this environment)

out_of_scope_followup: Portal (/portal) likely has the same benign favicon 404; not touched per tiny-scope mandate.
verdict: FIX_APPLIED — root cause CONFIRMED (code); CLOSED/PASS pending live browser-smoke confirmation
